name: terminalai
description: Terminal with an AI chat panel — PTY, multi-provider LLMs, optional agent
author: TerminalAI contributors <terminalai@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts.app: concurrently -k "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev" "wait-on -t 120000 http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/health http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_USE_VITE_DEV=1 ELECTRON_START_SERVER=0 electron ."
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run build:server && cross-env NODE_ENV=production ELECTRON_START_SERVER=1 ELECTRON_USE_VITE_DEV=0 electron .
scripts.build:server: esbuild server/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist-server/index.cjs --external:better-sqlite3 --external:node-pty --log-level=warning && mkdir -p dist-server/shellIntegration && cp server/shellIntegration/*.fish server/shellIntegration/*.sh dist-server/shellIntegration/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:app: npm run build && npm run build:server && electron-builder
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test server/cline/clineResolve.test.ts server/lib/workspacePathSandbox.test.ts server/lib/terminalExitOsc.test.ts server/lib/agentSecretLeak.test.ts server/lib/agentStylePrefs.test.ts server/agent/streamProtocol.test.ts server/agent/toolRepeatGuard.test.ts server/agent/workspaceGrepTool.test.ts server/agent/registrySearchTools.test.ts server/agent/fetchUrlTool.test.ts server/agent/readDocsTool.test.ts server/agent/approvalEnv.test.ts server/agent/workspaceReadBeforeWrite.test.ts server/agent/workspaceClientDirtyPaths.test.ts server/agent/workspaceReadSecretRedact.test.ts server/agent/webSearchTool.test.ts server/agent/symbolWorkspaceTools.test.ts server/agent/outlineWorkspaceTool.test.ts server/agent/workspaceToolsFileOps.test.ts server/agent/workspaceSkillsPrompt.test.ts server/routes/persistencePrefsSchema.test.ts server/routes/agentRequestShared.test.ts server/routes/agentBody.test.ts src/lib/agentStreamFetch.test.ts src/lib/codeFontSize.test.ts src/lib/workspacePathHeuristic.test.ts src/lib/agentActivitySummary.test.ts src/lib/mcpConfigParse.test.ts src/lib/agentStreamInterruptedNotice.test.ts && tsx server/scripts/agent-smoke.ts
